diagrams.title: Relation Structure
diagrams.description: A table showing Student relation with attributes (columns) and tuples (rows)
elements: Attribute Headers: StudentID, Name, Age, Dept, CGPA
Tuples/Records: Row 1 (S001, John, 20, CS, 8.5), Row 2 (S002, Mary, 21, IT, 9.0), Row 3 (S003, Tom, 19, CS, 7.8)
Degree: 5 (number of columns)
Cardinality: 3 (number of rows)
Primary Key: StudentID (underlined)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the basic structure of a relation with all components clearly labeled

diagrams.title: Key Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing relationship between Super Key, Candidate Key, and Primary Key
elements: Level 1 (Bottom): Super Key - {A}, {A,B}, {A,C}, {A,B,C} etc.
Level 2 (Middle): Candidate Key - {A}, {B,C} (minimal sets)
Level 3 (Top): Primary Key - {A} (chosen candidate key)
Arrows showing containment relationship
diagrams.purpose: Understand the hierarchy and relationship between different types of keys

diagrams.title: Entity and Referential Integrity
diagrams.description: Two tables showing Employee and Department with integrity constraints
elements: Employee Table: EmpID (PK), Name, DeptID (FK)
Department Table: DeptID (PK), DeptName
Entity Integrity: EmpID cannot be NULL
Referential Integrity: DeptID in Employee must match DeptID in Department or be NULL
Visual arrows showing FK referencing PK
diagrams.purpose: Understand how integrity constraints work between related tables

diagrams.title: Selection vs Projection
diagrams.description: Demonstration of Selection (horizontal) and Projection (vertical) operations on a table
elements: Original Table: Employee with columns (ID, Name, Dept, Salary)
Selection σ(Salary>50000): Shows only rows where salary > 50000 (horizontal slice)
Projection π(Name, Dept): Shows only Name and Dept columns (vertical slice)
Visual highlighting showing what portion of table is selected
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between row-wise and column-wise operations in relational algebra

diagrams.title: Relational Algebra Operations Summary
diagrams.description: Visual chart showing all basic relational algebra operations
elements: Unary Operations: Selection (σ), Projection (π), Rename (ρ)
Binary Operations: Union (∪), Set Difference (−), Cartesian Product (×), Intersection (∩)
Special Operations: Join (⋈), Division, Natural Join
Symbol and purpose for each operation
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for all relational algebra operations and their symbols
